title: Verascore Evidence Record — v0.1 (local working mirror)
description: Local working mirror of the canonical schema published at https://verascore.ai/schemas/verascore-evidence-schema-v0.1.json. Field set, types, and evidence_type enum derived from A2A #1786 (@arian-gogani) and the Verascore docs page at https://verascore.ai/docs/evidence-schema-v0.1. Replace with the upstream artefact once it is fetchable from a CI runner; the canonical $id is preserved so a swap is a single-line change.

subject.description: The entity the evidence describes — for Observatory this is the MCP server URL (canonical server_id).

signals.description: Source-specific signal payload. For behavioral evidence Observatory ships trust_score + success_rate + latency + uptime + interaction counts.

provenance.description: Who measured this, how, and where it can be verified.
